endpoints.name: GET /v1/Services
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Services for Twilio Proxy. A maximum of 100 records will be returned per page.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Services
endpoints.description: Create a new Service for Twilio Proxy
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/PhoneNumbers
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Phone Numbers in the Proxy Number Pool for a Service. A maximum of 100 records will be returned per page.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/PhoneNumbers
endpoints.description: Add a Phone Number to a Service's Proxy Number Pool.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/PhoneNumbers/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch a specific Phone Number.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/PhoneNumbers/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Update a specific Proxy Number.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/PhoneNumbers/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete a specific Phone Number from a Service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/Sessions
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Sessions for the Service. A maximum of 100 records will be returned per page.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/Sessions
endpoints.description: Create a new Session
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/Sessions/{SessionSid}/Interactions
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Interactions for a Session. A maximum of 100 records will be returned per page.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SESSIONSID}} with a real sessionsid. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/Sessions/{SessionSid}/Interactions/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of Interactions for a given [Session](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/api/session).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SESSIONSID}} with a real sessionsid. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/Sessions/{SessionSid}/Interactions/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete a specific Interaction.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SESSIONSID}} with a real sessionsid. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/Sessions/{SessionSid}/Participants
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Participants in a Session.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SESSIONSID}} with a real sessionsid. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/Sessions/{SessionSid}/Participants
endpoints.description: Add a new Participant to the Session
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SESSIONSID}} with a real sessionsid. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/Sessions/{SessionSid}/Participants/{ParticipantSid}/MessageInteractions
endpoints.description: TODO: Resource-level docs
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SESSIONSID}} with a real sessionsid. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{PARTICIPANTSID}} with a real participantsid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/Sessions/{SessionSid}/Participants/{ParticipantSid}/MessageInteractions
endpoints.description: Create a new message Interaction to send directly from your system to one [Participant](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/api/participant).  The `inbound` properties for the Interaction will always be empty.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SESSIONSID}} with a real sessionsid. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{PARTICIPANTSID}} with a real participantsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/Sessions/{SessionSid}/Participants/{ParticipantSid}/MessageInteractions/{Sid}
endpoints.description: TODO: Resource-level docs
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SESSIONSID}} with a real sessionsid. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{PARTICIPANTSID}} with a real participantsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/Sessions/{SessionSid}/Participants/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch a specific Participant.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SESSIONSID}} with a real sessionsid. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/Sessions/{SessionSid}/Participants/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete a specific Participant. This is a soft-delete. The participant remains associated with the session and cannot be re-added. Participants are only permanently deleted when the [Session](https://www.twilio.com/docs/proxy/api/session) is deleted.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SESSIONSID}} with a real sessionsid. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/Sessions/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch a specific Session.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/Sessions/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Update a specific Session.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/Sessions/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete a specific Session.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/ShortCodes
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Short Codes in the Proxy Number Pool for the Service. A maximum of 100 records will be returned per page.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/ShortCodes
endpoints.description: Add a Short Code to the Proxy Number Pool for the Service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/ShortCodes/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch a specific Short Code.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/ShortCodes/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Update a specific Short Code.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/Services/{ServiceSid}/ShortCodes/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete a specific Short Code from a Service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Services/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch a specific Service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Services/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Update a specific Service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/Services/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete a specific Service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.
